title: Before/after closure evidence for #1680 completion-cost lane

retention.reason: retained evidence summarizes #1680 before/after and remaining-cost routing without replaying the full PR stack
retention.trust_rule: Use this record as the #1680 closeout-readiness input; parent closure is authorized only because current issue/PR state and routed follow-up owners are recorded here.
retention.rule: Retained closeout evidence preserves reportable closeout facts for lane-level continuation.

active_milestone.scope: Record compact before/after evidence and remaining-cost routing for #1680.

closure_check.routed_follow_up_cost_sources: #1697 workspace runtime editing remains a future large-file symbol-routing improvement; #1698 operator guidance remains a documentation/support improvement; #1700-#1704 local checkpoint experiment remains an experimental continuity lane; #1706 planning workflow friction remains a dogfooding follow-up. These are explicitly routed owner issues, not blockers for the #1680 evidence-loop closeout.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The #1680 evidence loop has static analysis, actual JSON ranking, allowed-model long-horizon behavior proof, landed reductions, and compact before/after measurement. Previously pending child issues #1692-#1696 have merged supporting PRs; remaining cost sources are preserved as follow-up owners rather than hidden or counted as unresolved parent blockers.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: scripts/check/check_completion_cost_lane_evidence.py reads this record and reports ready-for-closeout-review when parent permission is granted and remaining blocker count is zero.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen if a routed follow-up is found to be required for the original #1680 evidence-loop closure, or if live behavior proof/regression evidence invalidates the measured reductions.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Before/after evidence must distinguish measured reductions from unresolved cost owners and child issue state.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Future #1680 closeout should use this compact record instead of replaying the full PR stack.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: Promoted by current issue/PR reconciliation: completed child issues have merged supporting PRs and remaining cost sources are routed to non-blocking follow-up owners.
